creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Created attachment 221160
Patch to update py-parso to 0.8.1

The recent update of /devel/py-jedi to 0.18.0 broke devel/ipython, because /devel/py-jedi now requires testproc/py-parso 0.8.0 and the version in the ports tree is 0.7.1.

The attached patch updates py-parso to 0.8.1, the most recent release.
